text:
If I attempt to adjust my cpu mic input, /dev/dsp2, the mute button
automatically is checked and I can no longer adjust the input at all.
 It is necessary to click between the two devices to get the slider
bar back to 50%.  Therefore, the mic input is restricted to 50% as
well.  See attached screenshot, remove the .txt
